text:
{
  "isSuspicious": true,
  "deviation": "The process 'payload.exe' is not a standard Windows binary and was executed from the Downloads folder. It performs suspicious registry modifications, including creating keys under user-specific Policies and SystemCertificates, which is highly unusual for a legitimate application.",
  "indicators": [
    "payload.exe",
    "execution from Downloads folder",
    "registry modification HKEY_CURRENT_USER\\Software\\Microsoft\\Windows\\CurrentVersion",
    "registry modification HKEY_CURRENT_USER\\Software\\Policies\\Microsoft\\System",
    "registry modification HKEY_CURRENT_USER\\Software\\Microsoft\\SystemCertificates",
    "loading wininet.dll",
    "loading ws2_32.dll",
    "loading crypt32.dll",
    "loading schannel.dll",
    "loading bcrypt.dll",
    "loading ncrypt.dll",
    "loading dpapi.dll",
    "loading wintrust.dll"
  ]
}
